hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'Package\.resolved|\.swiftlint\.yml|\.swiftformat'; then echo 'BLOCK: このファイルはユーザーの明示的な指示なしに編集しないでください' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.swift'; then cd MmdviewApp && swift package plugin --allow-writing-to-package-directory swiftformat 2>&1 | tail -3; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.swift'; then cd MmdviewApp && swift build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.swift'; then cd MmdviewApp && swift test --skip Integration --skip FileWatcherTests 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'viewer\.(js|html)'; then cd MmdviewApp && npx jest --silent 2>&1; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.github/workflows/.*\.ya?ml'; then command -v actionlint >/dev/null || { echo 'actionlint 未インストール: brew install actionlint'; exit 0; }; out=$(actionlint 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; fi
